titleStmt.title: SII 28.19: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 19. (A.R. No. 19 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartti Rājādhirāja II Year 5, Tulā, 15, Monday, Viśākham-1170 A.D. October 12^1^

summary.p: The chief noteworthy feature in this record is the date. Whereas in all the records of this king which supply details of the date, each set of those details is found to be capable of being equated to two dates in the Christian era, on the basis of assuming his initial year of reign either as 1163 A.D. or as 1166 A.D., in the instant case, for the details of date given, there is only one equivalent as given above in the half century 1151-1200. A.D. This indicates that only 1166 A.D., was the initial year of this king's reign. Another notable detail is the reference to a Vīrāntara-pperunteru as a quarter accommodating merchants in Tiṭṭaikuḍi alias Tiruchchiṟṟambalachatur-vēdimaṅgalam.

4 Cows were endowed for a sandhi lamp for God Tirukkuraṅgāḍuuḍaiya-Mahādēvar in brahmadēyam Iṟaivāṉ-puṉchey in Ugaḷūr-kkūṟṟam in Muḍikoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by, possibly, a trader. The endowment was received with a promise to execute the wishes of the donor by three śivabrāhmaṇas, two of whom at least bear one the same names as of those that figure in No. 16 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrīrājādhi rājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu tulānāyaṟṟup patinañcān tiyatiyum vicākam peṟṟa tiṅkaṭ kiḻamai nāḷ muṭikoṇṭa
coḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Ukaḷūrkkūṟṟattu pramateyam Iṟaivāṉ puṉceyt tirukkuraṅkāṭu Uṭaiyama r koyilil civappirāmaṇan pālāsraya piccan cantiracekaranā
na nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭanum pāratāyan rācaciṅka mātevanāta dakṣiṇāmurtti paṇṭitanum pālāciriyan kanṟumaccān Āticcatevanāna tirucciṟṟampala paṭ
tiṭṭaikuṭiyāna tirucciṟṟampalaccarup petimaṅkalattu virāntarapperunteruvilirukkum viyāpārikaḷil ṉ Ātittan Uyyavantānpakkal Innāyanārkku
1. cf A.R.Ep., 1914, p. 59. LDS Pillai has suggested the date eighth year for the record, But he has also inserted a query.

ti viḷakku E ku nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa pacu nālu Ippacu nālum kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ cella Iccanti viḷakku cantirātittavaṟ cella Eṟṟakkaṭavomākavum Ikkāṇi vakkaḷakuṭamumalakum
koṇṭu pacu kāttu kāṇiceyyavumvan Iccanti viḷakku cantirātittavaṟ cella Eṟṟakkaṭavomāka Ippaṭi cammatittom Immūvom .
Digital edition of SII 28.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
